title: Finding the Third Angle of a Triangle

steps.instruction: The three interior angles of any triangle sum to 180°.
steps.work: angle A + angle B + angle C = 180°
steps.explanation: This is true for all triangles — right, acute, or obtuse.

steps.instruction: A triangle has angles of 72° and 53°. Find the third.
steps.explanation: Add the known angles and subtract from 180°.

title: Using Algebra with Triangle Angle Sum

steps.instruction: A triangle has angles x°, (x + 20)°, and (2x − 10)°.
steps.explanation: All three angle expressions must sum to 180°.
